raw_text: recently faced packaging issue. The issue was resolved after. The main hassle is extremely poor customer service. No option of writing the issue. Most of the time issues not listed in the drop down bot options. extremely frustrating

the excess charges are so high and not so convenient as instamart as time is even so long and no cancellation even just after ordering poor addressing. but if there no availability of other apps this can be used

I am not happy with Blinkit's service. Yesterday, I placed two orders worth ₹149 each. After adding delivery and handling charges, the total amount became ₹191. However, at the time of delivery, I was charged an additional ₹221 due to high-demand or rush-hour fees. I would like to point out that managing high demand is Blinkit's responsibility and should not result in extra charges for customers. Other delivery applications do not impose such additional fees during rush hours. This experience

I ordered curd along with other item, since curd or milk pack is generally moist the paper bag got torn and the stuff fell on the road though it was not riders mistake. a plastic bag is much better in handing wet stuff. also blinkit needs to put a OTP system in case of prepaid orders to verify if the stuff is going to right person. also u need to keep your feedback system flexible let the person write feedback in the app so that the person does not have come and write here.

Hi Blinkit team, I was placing an order and after calculating all items, I found around ₹100 difference in the final bill. I was shocked because orders above ₹200 usually should not have shipping charges. My order total was above ₹200, so why is this extra ₹100 difference showing? Please explain the charges clearly.
manipulate for things that they don't even intend to deliver. like it will send you a message about price fall and when you visit it's app it will always either be out of stock or at higher prices

to waste the app and too much extra charge for no reason I use his app in kanataka . Gulbarga They are doing extra for each app and delivery handle but it does not even work properly item damage , not delivering items on time but taking delivery charges I refer to everyone to not use his worst app Customer Care is also like I made the mistake of using his app . please think before u order anything and be ready to pay extra on every thing without any reason there don't care there just care .

worst experience, Actually I returned a product that I had issues with its already been used by someone else. Contact some blinkit employee they said me to return and they took that product but I didn't get refund and any update on refund. I want refund immediately it's already been too late. No response from app about my refund. Not at all good response 👎🏻

very poor service, support staff not be able to resolve my problem, I oder tripod ,it's size is too big , I approach support, but staff not be able to solve my problem, they said it's not returnable item , but when I see product app there mention 7 days returnable policy, poor service, I uninstall this app now

Packaging quality is really low. I received dirty and leaky packets, and the delivery guys never have change. For example, if the bill is 460 and I give a 500 rupee note, they don't have 40-50 rupees in change and always ask for online transfers. There are no cash-friendly transactions.

for a week, they keep going from 200 minimum order to 499 to avoid surcharge, everyday 499 all time, its very expensive. for milk and some necessary items the app shows unavailable for service or 499rs..it was good previously, but now I stopped ordering.

don't buy any product from blinkit. used , broken products sell on these app. I purchase an umbrella from blinkit which is totally broken totally waste all my money.there is no any replacement or any exchange of product.there no one number where I can tell my issue. how can I send these umbrella back to blinkit . please tell me .

they don't respond to their customer complaint, can't trust on Blinkit because last time I ordered 2 pack of noodles and paid for it online but they only provided me 1 pack only and when I connected to help center they said ok u'll be getting the other pack within 15 mins and please kindly rate us on chat box, I said ok, but after 10 mins it's all closed and written this product is not available so we can,t deliver and chat disconnected. very poor experience ever no refund no exchange nothing

Blinkit is good but a issue happened. My order was suddenly cancelled ten minutes after the delivery partner picked it up. This happened through no fault of my own. Please investigate this issue immediately. Thank you. Edit: Please kindly give me option of cash on delivery back .

This is the worst delivery app. They did not deliver one item after complete payment for the order. They refused to refund for the undelivered product even after sharing all the relevant delivered products. No sense of responsibility. Most fraudulent act.

i had ordered some items and according to the app I can modify or add items to them within 5 minutes and I had done that but still they charged me delivery and handling charges and was showing two different orders... unable to understand the process and not want to pay delivery and handling charges as my amount is over 500 rupees

very bad experience it's been more than 10 minutes ,order is still showing that it will take 10 minutes ,if it is not possible to deliver than why did you took my order , unhappy with virtual assistant also , giving limited help option which is not working at all , I'm not going to use blinkit in future ,I have ordered water and they didn't give me any cold water option also , they only showed eagerness in deducting 100% more amount , that too on essential items

I confirmed cancellation of my order, but it was still delivered. I reordered assuming cancellation, and both orders got delivered. This is clearly a system failure, yet no refund is being provided. Extremely disappointed. Please resolve this.

Hai Team, Recently I ordered some items from the Blinkit app one product not so good I raised the query also, your team raised a refund request. but I didn't receive my refund amount till now In the application there is no customer chat support also not available only bot chat available. I didn't find any chat or call support in the Blinkit application. resolve my issue as soon as possible

Very disappointing experience with Blinkit. They promise 10-minute delivery, but my order took almost 1 hour, and after reaching my location, the order was suddenly cancelled. Completely wasted my time for nothing. Poor service and very unprofessional handling of orders. I’m extremely angry and disappointed. After today, I’m never going to use Blinkit again.
